app.name: JustOneAPI Data Aggregator
app.one_liner: A commercial data API service that provides scraped data from over 30 Chinese and international platforms including Taobao, Xiaohongshu, Facebook, and YouTube.

screens.name: Platform Data Explorer
screens.purpose: Allows users to browse and select data sources across e-commerce, social media, and job platforms.
primary_actions: View available data types (e.g., product details, user notes)

rust_commands.name: fetch_platform_data
rust_commands.purpose: Retrieve structured data from a specified platform endpoint (e.g., Taobao product details).

mvp_plan: week 1: Define core set of supported platforms (Taobao, Xiaohongshu, Bilibili)
week 1: Design minimal API request/response schema
week 1: Map available data types per platform from README claims
acceptance_tests: Confirm that each listed platform has at least one documented data type (e.g., 'product details', 'user notes').
Verify that the main screen lists all platforms mentioned in the README (e.g., Taobao, Xiaohongshu, Facebook).
